message:
test(fcp-core): pin OperationInfo 12-field serde matrix + skip-when-None semantics (flywheel_connectors-v0uat)

Bead asks for OperationDescriptor JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named OperationDescriptor exists in fcp-core; the closest
analogue is OperationInfo at protocol.rs:2019, the per-operation
introspection record returned by connectors. ConnectorDescriptor in
connector_descriptors.rs describes the connector-as-a-whole, not a
single operation.

No prior test pins OperationInfo's wire shape — grep returns empty.

Coverage: 12-field full JSON shape, 9-field minimal JSON shape with
skip-when-None for description + rate_limit + requires_approval,
embedded RiskLevel/SafetyTier/IdempotencyClass snake_case serde tags,
ApprovalMode "policy" tag through requires_approval, JSON+CBOR
round-trip preserves all decision-critical fields, JSON+CBOR
cross-format equality, distinct-safety-tier and distinct-idempotency
sentinels (governance axes must reach the wire), input_schema
preserves arbitrary serde_json::Value shapes (object/array/scalar/null/
nested) through both formats, AgentHint default serializes empty
strings + [] arrays (no skip_serializing_if), nested RateLimit's burst
+ scope + pool_name omit when None.

11 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-v0uat cargo test -p
fcp-core --test operation_descriptor_serde_tag_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
